title: That believers who differ among themselves ought not to refer to a Gentile judge.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That believers who differ among themselves ought not to refer to a Gentile judge.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In the first Epistle of Paul to the Corinthians: “Dares any of you, having a matter against another, to discuss it among the unrighteous, and not among the saints?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Know ye not that the saints shall judge this world?”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: And again: “Now indeed there is altogether a fault among you, because ye have judgments one against another.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Wherefore do ye not rather suffer injury? or wherefore are ye not rather defrauded?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: But ye do wrong, and defraud, and this your brethren.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Know ye not that the unrighteous shall not obtain the kingdom of God?”
